---
title: "MFC Jamboree"
subtitle: "PhD Jamboree"
author: "Nicola Gnecco"
---

# Welcome

- Welcome to the MFC Jamboree.
- https://crsl4.github.io/julia-workshop/
- https://github.com/crsl4/julia-workshop/blob/main/_quarto.yml
- This page collects materials, code, and workshop information.
- The goal is to provide a simple hub for the event.
- Materials are available in the repository.

## Learning objectives

At the end of the session, participants will be able to:

- understand the problem setup
- inspect and run the provided code
- reproduce basic results
- discuss extensions and open questions

## Schedule

| Time | Topic | Presenter |
|---|---|---|
| 10:00–10:15 | Introduction | Nicola Gnecco |
| 10:15–11:00 | Student presentations | TBD |
| 11:00–11:45 | Mini workshop | Nicola Gnecco |
| 11:45–12:00 | Discussion | All |

## Materials

- [Python code](materials/group-1.py)
- [Preparation folder](materials/)

## In preparation for the workshop

Participants are encouraged to:

1. clone the repository  
2. look through the preparation material  
3. make sure Python/R runs locally  
4. come with questions  

## Notes

- All material is intentionally minimal.
- Focus is on discussion and interaction.
